title: salvia rubescens subsp. colombiana
intro: Salvia rubescens subsp. colombiana, also known as Colombian red sage, is a subspecies of Salvia, a genus of flowering plants in the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia rubescens subsp. colombiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
